dialogue_content.speaker: PLAYER
dialogue_content.line: Anne. The village is falling apart. I need to know what's still possible.

dialogue_content.speaker: anne
dialogue_content.line: Possible is a strong word these days. But there's talk. Sarah was working on a cure over at the laboratory before she went quiet.

dialogue_content.speaker: PLAYER
dialogue_content.line: Went quiet how?

dialogue_content.speaker: anne
dialogue_content.line: The kind of quiet that means infected. The lab's locked tight too. No power, no key. George says the key got buried with the last man who held it — graveyard, if you've the stomach.

dialogue_content.speaker: PLAYER
dialogue_content.line: And the power?

dialogue_content.speaker: anne
dialogue_content.line: Fuse is inside the lab itself. Classic. George at the powerstation can wire it back in once you've got it. One more thing — a cure needs a sample. There's one at the old hospital. Marcus is holed up there. He won't shoot you if you don't give him reason.

dialogue_content.speaker: PLAYER
dialogue_content.line: Thank you, Anne.

dialogue_content.speaker: anne
dialogue_content.line: Don't thank me yet. Just come back breathing.

dialogue_content.speaker: marcus
dialogue_content.line: Far enough. State your business.

dialogue_content.speaker: PLAYER
dialogue_content.line: Sarah's cure sample. Anne said it was here.

dialogue_content.speaker: marcus
dialogue_content.line: It is. Vial on the tray. Don't break it.

dialogue_content.speaker: PLAYER
dialogue_content.line: You're not coming?

dialogue_content.speaker: marcus
dialogue_content.line: Holding this position. Someone has to. Take it and go — and don't waste it.

dialogue_content.speaker: PLAYER
dialogue_content.line: George. I need the laboratory back on the grid.

dialogue_content.speaker: george
dialogue_content.line: Lab's offline. Blown fuse inside. Bring me a new one and I'll route the power.

dialogue_content.speaker: PLAYER
dialogue_content.line: Where do I find one?

dialogue_content.speaker: george
dialogue_content.line: Spare's in the lab itself. Get inside, grab it, bring it here. Simple.

dialogue_content.speaker: PLAYER
dialogue_content.line: Lab's locked. Key's in the graveyard.

dialogue_content.speaker: george
dialogue_content.line: Then start digging.

dialogue_content.speaker: PLAYER
dialogue_content.line: Got your fuse.

dialogue_content.speaker: george
dialogue_content.line: Hand it here. I'll wire the lab line directly.

dialogue_content.speaker: PLAYER
dialogue_content.line: How long?

dialogue_content.speaker: george
dialogue_content.line: Long as it takes. Stand back.

dialogue_content.speaker: sarah
dialogue_content.line: You shouldn't be in here. I'm... not what I was a day ago.

dialogue_content.speaker: PLAYER
dialogue_content.line: I have your sample. Power's back on. Tell me how to finish it.

dialogue_content.speaker: sarah
dialogue_content.line: The synthesis rig. Load the sample, run the cycle. The output is the antidote. It works on me — I've checked the math more times than I should admit.

dialogue_content.speaker: PLAYER
dialogue_content.line: Then hold on. I'm going to fix this.

dialogue_content.speaker: sarah
dialogue_content.line: Be quick. I'd rather be cured than studied.
